nasb.text: serving the Lord with all humility and with tears and with trials which came upon me through the plots of the Jews;

esv.text: serving the Lord with all humility and with tears and with trials that happened to me through the plots of the Jews;

cnv.text: 怎樣服事主，凡事謙卑，常常流淚，忍受猶太人謀害的試煉。

ccb.text: 我含着眼泪谦卑地事奉主，又遭到犹太人的迫害，历尽艰辛。

csbs.text: 我在完全的谦卑中、泪水中、以及因犹太人的阴谋而带来的许多试炼中服事主；
